channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Open-world adventure game CookieRun: New World announced for console, PC, and mobile
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Smartphone

Due out in 2029.

Devsisters has announced CookieRun: New World, an open-world adventure game based on the CookieRun mobile game franchise with over 300 million players and more than $1 billion in lifetime revenue. It will launch for console, PC, and mobile in 2029 to coincide with the franchise’s 20th anniversary.

Developed in Unreal Engine, CookieRun: New World is described as the franchise’s “most ambitious title to date.” It is set after the era of the legendary Five Heroes, the game follows a new journey across the Cookie continent as a mysterious darkness returns.

The CookieRun: New World announcement was part of a larger Devsisters Online Showcase held today, which featured the following additional announcements:

  • CookieRun: Crumble (iOS, Android)
    • A new casual title launching in the second half of 2026. CookieRun: Crumble draws inspiration from the idle RPG and casual mobile genre, delivering an accessible, relaxed gameplay experience designed for a wide audience while retaining the franchise’s signature charm.
  • CookieRun: Kingdom Chapter 2 (iOS, Android)
    • CookieRun: Kingdom, the franchise’s flagship RPG with over 80 million players, is entering its next major story era. The new arc centers on a catastrophic event that fractures the world’s timeline, sparking a war across multiple timelines as different factions fight to determine which version of reality will survive. The update also introduces a new playable region and accelerates the game’s main story cadence from every four weeks to every two weeks. The update is scheduled for May.
    • CookieRun Kingdom will also have a K-Pop Demon Hunters collaboration in April. The collaboration combines the hit animated film that became a global phenomenon in 2025 with CookieRun: Kingdom in YouTube’s Top 10 Trending Report for the U.S status that screams “this will be a massive viral hit.”
  • CookieRun: OvenSmash (iOS, Android)
    • The franchise’s first real-time player-versus-player battle action game. Players assemble teams of Cookies and compete in fast three-minute matches across six game modes, using role-based abilities and Spell Cards to shift the momentum of battle. The game is set in Platter City, a new urban-fantasy world built around the Oven Crown Cup tournament. More than two million players have pre-registered ahead of launch on March 26.
  • CookieRun: Braverse – A Game of Truth and Deceit (Tabletop Trading Card Game)
    • The newest booster set for CookieRun: Braverse, the franchise’s tabletop trading card game is scheduled for March 27. The expansion introduces:
      • 243 regular cards and 61 hidden cards, including Shadow Milk Cookie variants (a key character from CookieRun: Kingdom) across all five colors.
      • Two new set themes (“Realm of Apathy” and “Land of Fire & Ruin”).
      • The new Extra Card mechanic, which lets players overlay cards onto Cookies in play for stronger follow-up plays and new comeback opportunities.
    • The Braverse TCG has distributed nearly 80 million cards globally since its 2023 launch in Korea.

Watch the CookieRun: New World announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

Screenshots
